column1: C[keith.river: that was a good game -) thanks for playing -)
seanachain: oh! Thanks for the game.
keith.river: hoped you wont see that bottom group :D
keith.river: well what am i saying, i was playing with fingers crossed i think from around move 120 -)
C[anoek: Hi, gl and welcome to Nova!
C[ivashkov.nikita: thanks ) haven't played for a long time -) nice site you have here )
anoek: Thanks! Well if you have any feedback let me know :)
C[anoek: Sorry for the delay, had some features to write over the weekend! :)
C[anoek: Just so you know I have that disappearing input bug fixed up, it'll be included in the next patch (which will probably be in the next 24 to 48 hours)
C[anoek: Hey btw to enable sounds, click on 'Game Preferences' and select 'Enable Sounds' :)
ivashkov.nikita: you probably should make it default setting )
ivashkov.nikita: normally i would probably take a look at options first but lately often playing a technical noob for some reason
anoek: Hehe :) well we have a thing against websites making sounds without our explicit permission.. that's why it's disabled by default :)
anoek: although it might be more expected here.. we'll see, we may very well end up doing that at some point :)
C[ivashkov.nikita: well actually yeah (= board sound is kinda annoying
ivashkov.nikita: i mean it would be nice to just have notification sound for new moves availible
ivashkov.nikita: that way you don't have to check up browser tab to see if there is anything new or not
ivashkov.nikita: in opposite sounds on the board that i'm looking at i would prefer to be switched off )
C[ivashkov.nikita: especially if the game is going faster then few moves a minute )
anoek: Yeah :) So prozz has started putting together an extension for chrome that shows you a little turn indicator fyi: https://github.com/prozz/nova-notifier/
anoek: but also, we'd like to do desktop notifications at some point here.. but gotta get some of the bugs worked out before we turn our attention to that :)
C[ivashkov.nikita: it's actually quite easily done
ivashkov.nikita: you already have black notification in the corner which is updating in real time
ivashkov.nikita: just add the same click sound to it
ivashkov.nikita: chrome addons are good but you know there could be a limit of how many you want to have, not to mention that not everybody have chrome

C[anoek: Yep that's true.. although we have to do a little more work than that since most people have lots of tabs open, so we have to have some inter-tab communications going so they don't all try to play the sound, that could get intense :)
anoek: I'll put it on to the feature list though, i like that idea
C[ivashkov.nikita: oh that would be a problem indeed :D
anoek: haha, finally you do one too :)
C[ivashkov.nikita: that happens when you're saying to yourself ""need to go to bed... oh no few more moves, and few more..."" -)
anoek: well i was just thinking i should probably get some more work done anyways, so this will be my last move for awhile, we can pick it up tomorrow :)
C[keith.river: hmm fine for me for now
keith.river: did you placed it, or it was analyze intended stone? )
keith.river: now that same thing happened with that input box
anoek: that was a conditional move that fired :)
anoek: that is really strange man
keith.river: yeah, i'm afraid to do analysis not in my turn because of this actually -)
keith.river: and only now i've got what that conditional moves thing does -)
C[keith.river: oh, that's a mistake by my side i suppose -)
keith.river: i should go get some sleep -)
anoek: hehe, i was gonna say, doesn't seem like a mistake to me :)
anoek: i thought i could get a couple of eyes in there.. doesn't look like it though :(
C[keith.river: yep that one was dead (=

C[anoek: We pushed up some fixes that addressed some w3c validation errors we had on this page.. they *may* fix your problem with the navbar / input thing, but seeing as we can't reproduce it over here we don't know for sure. Could you try and see if you're still having the problem?
keith.river: I've let you know if it appears
C[anoek: Do you get any notification emails from us? You *should* be getting running-out-of-time emails at 12 hours to go as well
anoek: i take it you're not receiving those?
C[keith.river: i'm getting ""it's your move"" sometimes if i'm out for a day pc is turned off
keith.river: i have a tab open most of the time, but no running out of time for now
keith.river: also this bar error is happening right now
keith.river: usually i'm checking once or twice a day and it's all less then 10 hours left on counters
anoek: Can you do ctrl-shift-J click on console, and run
anoek: and tell me what the output is?
anoek: (if you havn't already reloaded your page that is)
C[keith.river: i'll do when it appears next time
keith.river: i'm doing that but navbar returns to normal when i'm changing focus to console
keith.river: found it in elements tab also
keith.river: at any moment it just shows the normal place of navbar
keith.river: i'm a noob, but maybe it's related to focus and overlay mechanics? for instance it's thinking that top of the page is the top of currently selected element
C[anoek: What the heck, that is so very weird :(
anoek: Yep i think so too
C[matburt: How did you hear about us?
ivashkov.nikita: friend send a link via social net )
ivashkov.nikita: great site at first look )
matburt: Gotcha!  Well I'm not very good but it'll be a fun match
C[matburt: I'm going to be slow on moves for a bit... I'm working on some code for the site
ivashkov.nikita: i see what you're saying -) you should implement handicap system here actually )
ivashkov.nikita: since i've stated being 20k on registration, determining matches should be with stones for black )
C[matburt: You mean a handicap?  That's true... I created this game with no handicap, however.
C[ivashkov.nikita: oh, then the option is available?
ivashkov.nikita: didn't seen create game screen as of yet )
matburt: Yep... you can even control the number of handicap stones given
matburt: or just let it automatically choose based on ranking difference
C[matburt: hey there... you left some feedback that you'd like move sounds.... we actually already have that if you click the Game Preferences link below this box you can turn that on.
C[ivashkov.nikita: i spoke with anoek about that, i think he added thing in to do list
ivashkov.nikita: what i mean is sound with notifications in top right corner
ivashkov.nikita: so you don't have to check the tab on the matter if you have new moves or not

C[ivashkov.nikita: some things have to be played out before moving to next encounter, i think )
C[saya: so i probably lost those stones because I played in the top left?
C[ivashkov.nikita: yeah, though you havent lost the stones, just an oportunity to take left side of the board
C[ivashkov.nikita: also that F11 stone wasn't necessary
ivashkov.nikita: it not offending me or saving something
saya: ah, you are way above me. It still seems like people do random things that help them win. haha
C[ivashkov.nikita: i'm just seeing black and white stones and placing my next ones in between lol
C[saya: ha, you make it sound easy. I know better :)
C[ivashkov.nikita: well it also help if you decide what you are aiming for -)
C[ivashkov.nikita: this game is about territory control after all
C[ivashkov.nikita: it's ""either if i want to take side or secure in the center
saya: rumors tell me that sides are easier
saya: So far I have just let the middle part ""happen"", which is probably not the best strategy
C[ivashkov.nikita: you can also don't let me take the side )
ivashkov.nikita: the first thing is actually to decide what do you want
ivashkov.nikita: and probably calm yourself from thinking
ivashkov.nikita: ""i'll take this and this and this and the rest of the board""
saya: hehe, i guess that would be too ambitious
ivashkov.nikita: i'll go buy some water, brb
C[ivashkov.nikita: careful here, classic mistake might await -)
saya: i feel like it would be easy to corner myself, without you even having to do much.
C[ivashkov.nikita: well i could make misses too
saya: did I have a better choice? seems like if I went in S14 that would have killed a bigger group
ivashkov.nikita: in that one i was going to mark some stones to the chat
saya: don't worry, i'm sure you will still win. :) I'll suggest and ""agreed undo"" to the dev team
ivashkov.nikita: oh well ""what you gonna do"") i actually thought so too but to kill in S16 T16 i would need to secure T13 and T14 first
ivashkov.nikita: or i could just go for ko fight in T14
ivashkov.nikita: but you would probably still connect all for stones to the main group meanwhile
ivashkov.nikita: so now i'm paying for ""kinda"" wrong advises -)
saya: connecting them seems safer to me, so i will do that
C[ivashkov.nikita: i hope there would be a way to show stuff on board )
saya: There is... I think you analyze game. Let me check.
saya: Yeah, do the moves you want to show, then type in the ""Analysis name"" box and click ""Share""
saya: (you have to click analyze game first)
C[ivashkov.nikita: i should have guessed -) those two buttons scared me for somereason
C[saya: I do better when I check my moves with Analyze game first. I am sure I would be even worse live, if that is possible.
C[ivashkov.nikita: yeah that's nice feature ) i'm usually do that in mind and not so always correct ^_^""
C[saya: It's still hard to check all possibilities, so obviously doesn't make up for lack of experience.
C[saya: in my game with pitagoras http://nova.gs/game/209 I got the corner, but very little else in the bottom right, and having trouble getting anything there now. :(
C[saya: ok, I think i will leave the next move for tomorrow. Time to sleep.
ivashkov.nikita: i think your main problem is with target decisions -
ivashkov.nikita: you're making move there then switching for another place then trying to secure from behind
ivashkov.nikita: you need to decide what territory you could take right now and try to secure it for a degree when you can defend it if it would be contested and only then move to the next )
ivashkov.nikita: decision probably comes from understanding of what your opponent is trying to take
ivashkov.nikita: mostly you want to push him while taking opposite
ivashkov.nikita: i'll go right you go left and what in between decides how much of right and left there is
ivashkov.nikita: oh gosh i feel like i'm overdoing that tutoring stuff xD
ivashkov.nikita: the game it self is more fun and useful than all that behind the scenes stuff
saya: ooh, that would have been better. :) Now I've lost it. Well, I will try your advice.
C[ivashkov.nikita: in second 2 and 4 already dead so 5 isn't necessary
C[ivashkov.nikita: here i'm pretty much aiming to take bottom
ivashkov.nikita: S4 was kinda escaping move
saya: I was trying to get corner, but not very good at strategy yet
C[saya: i played p5 because it looks like i already messed up getting the bottom
C[ivashkov.nikita: that involves some slightly advanced conceptions though
saya: yeah, sacrificing the stone in the process would not have come to mind, though I see it works out
ivashkov.nikita: also here you could have more secure position with just walling off with 1
C[ivashkov.nikita: you're pushing from above mostly while i'm still taking the sides
C[ivashkov.nikita: i'm feeling myself big mean guy destroying everything around
C[ivashkov.nikita: probably with fire and explosions
ivashkov.nikita: surprisingly not the best feeling ever
saya: lol. i think that is the feeling you are just going to have when you play a noob :)
C[ivashkov.nikita: well i'm pretty sure my first games were almost like that )
ivashkov.nikita: i'm just feeling that whole situation scares you too much and you're over-thinking your defense a bit
ivashkov.nikita: that happens a lot with such games
C[ivashkov.nikita: for example E7 doing exactly nothing )
ivashkov.nikita: but ""I SHOULD STRENGTHEN MY GROUP! I NEED MOORE STONES""
ivashkov.nikita: is something you should probably avoid thinking -)
C[ivashkov.nikita: just look how thin i'm actually defending - you could probably attack here and there and make me respond by defending myself
ivashkov.nikita: well while connecting that big dying half wall in the bottom left ^_^""
ivashkov.nikita: it's not in immediate danger btw but it's something to look for when thinking where to expand
